mapper.update: UPDATE EMPLOYEE SET dep_id = #{depId}, dep_name = #{depName}, pos_id = #{posId}, rank_id = #{rankId}, role_id = #{roleId}, emp_cn = #{empCn}, emp_qd = #{empQd} WHERE emp_id = #{empId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE emp_qd IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE MONTH(emp_jd) = MONTH(NOW()) AND YEAR(emp_jd) = YEAR(NOW())
